name: Gloriosa
description:
__Affiliations:__ Kuja

Elder Nyon is one of the former Empresses for the Kuja tribe before Hancock took over. Hancock refers to her as the former-former-former empress Gloriosa. She seems to be designed around the concept of a wise old woman, as made apparent by her concerns for Amazon Lily itself and expressing knowledge that her fellow Kuja had no idea of. She also asks the Kuja pirates for books, and has a crystal ball, both things that would further this image.
